theme: algae fuel pond fleet on one feed line
title: One Feed Line, Many Ponds: Staggered Growth-to-Harvest Scheduling
strategies: single-pipe baseline: feed only one pond for the whole horizon, ignore the rest of the fleet
obvious recipe: split the horizon into P equal fixed turns in input order, give each pond the full cap for its whole turn, no reordering or batching

staggered-offset search: brute-force the fleet concurrency level K, place ponds into sequential batches sharing C/K, refine batch membership with pairwise-exchange local search, and solve each pond's own optimal-stopping window against its batch's effective feed
invalid: claim every pond draws the full cap simultaneously for the whole horizon (violates the shared feed cap)
